# LuxRente — Luxembourg Pension Calculator

> LuxRente reads a Luxembourg CCSS extrait de carrière and calculates accrued pension entitlements, an age-65 projection, early-retirement eligibility (57/60), the CNAP proportional pension under EU Regulation 883/2004, and the effect of voluntary contributions — entirely on-device.

## App

- [LuxRente on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/lu/app/luxrente/id6784285182): iOS app, free with a one-time unlock for the full projection. No account, no data leaves the device.

## Key topics covered

- CCSS extrait de carrière: import as photo or PDF, or scan directly in-app; obtainable via selfservice.ccss.lu or by post from the CCSS.
- Vorruhestand / early retirement / retraite anticipée (age 57 or 60), including required insurance months and the 2026 reform's extra-months rule.
- CNAP proportional (pro-rata) pension for careers spanning multiple EU countries, under EU Regulation 883/2004 Art. 52.
- AMVP voluntary pension contributions: tax deduction and pension impact.

## Resources

- [FAQ / Support](https://towog2.github.io/luxrente/#support): common questions in German, English, and French.
- [ETF vs. voluntary CCSS contributions comparison](https://towog2.github.io/luxrente/marketing/etf-vs-freiwillige-beitraege.html): trilingual comparison by career length.
- [Full ROI analysis](https://towog2.github.io/luxrente/marketing/roi-analyse-vollstaendig.html): 27-scenario methodology and tables (English).
